ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Transfer Receipt
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Continued To Mar-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustees, Appointment Of Receiver, For Distribution Of Trust Property, And An Accounting; Declaration Of Carroll J. Collins
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carroll J. Collins, in court, for and with Crystal and Jason Owyang, via Zoom, Petitioners; Susan O. Varela and Elaine O. Jaymot, in court, in propria persona Objectors.

Mr. Collins and Ms. Varela and Ms. Jaymot presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Petition for Removal of Trustees, etc., with Mr. Collins reporting that the current Trustees have not been diligent as Trustees and offers testimony in support of his position. Ms. Varela and Ms. Jaymot offer advocacy for their efforts as Trustees and advise that since they both reside in Contra Costa County and administer the estate there, this matter should be heard in that county. Mr. Collins reports that he filed the instant petition in this county on a recommendation from a probate Examiner in Contra Costa County and offers additional advocacy regarding his position that the Trustees have been negligent in managing the Trust. The court and the parties discuss the discovery motion and the court's ruling thereon with the court pointing to the fact that the Objectors did not file any papers in opposition to the motion and suggests to the Objectors that they seek the assistance of an attorney. The court offers Mr. Collins the option of the court dismissing the instant petition without prejudice or to transfer the matter to Contra Costa County. Mr. Collins requests that the court transfer the matter. The court advises that it will be issuing an order to transfer this matter to Contra Costa County. No objections to the court's tentative ruling are presented. Mr. Collins confirms that the court's ruling on his discovery motion stands.

The matter is submitted pending the court's order to transfer.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
